name: Life Shaver
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>削</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>りゆく<ruby lang="jp"><rb>命</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いのち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can only control 1 "Life Shaver". Once per turn, during your opponent's End Phase: Place 1 counter on this card. During the Main or Battle Phase, if this card has a counter(s) on it: You can send this card to the GY, then make your opponent discard as many cards as possible, up to the number of counters that were on this card.
eff: You can only control 1 "Life Shaver". Once per turn, during your opponent's End Phase: Place 1 counter on this card. During the Main or Battle Phase, if this card has a counter(s) on it: You can send this card to the GY, then make your opponent discard as many cards as possible, up to the number of counters that were on this card.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
